title: globulea nudicaulis
intro: Globulea nudicaulis, also known as the globeflower, is a perennial plant in the buttercup family native to North America. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Globulea nudicaulis include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Globulea nudicaulis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to create topical creams and ointments for skin care and wound healing.
